name: RaceIQ F2
summary: Sprint, feature-race, and championship forecasts for FIA Formula 2.
description: A purpose-built spec-series model: a leakage-safe driver-skill blend (Elo with rookie pooling + finishing history) routed through two race-type heads — a merit feature race and a reverse-grid sprint — with Monte Carlo win/podium probabilities, finishing-range intervals, a sprint+feature-aware championship projection, forward-eval, and drift/promotion monitoring. Full website with per-round sprint/feature detail, head-to-head matrices, and an accuracy dashboard. Runs on the real 2026 FIA Formula 2 season — official results are scraped into a committed, reviewable snapshot with model forecasts for upcoming rounds, refreshed on a schedule. ~75% reuses MotorsportVerse core.
datasets: fiaformula2.com (official results, scraped to a committed snapshot)
